summary: Frontend testing of Personalized Picks Panel flow completed successfully. Verified: 1) Login flow works, 2) PersonalizedPicksPanel opens via data-testid='personalized-picks-btn', 3) ProductDetailModal opens when clicking product cards, 4) 'Include' button in modal adds items to picks list, 5) Mini-cart shows selected items count, 6) 'Send to My Concierge' button triggers confirmation modal, 7) Confirmation modal shows selected items and 'Confirm' button, 8) After confirm, Mira responds with success message confirming picks were sent to Concierge.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ PersonalizedPicksPanel.jsx correctly implements onAddToPicks callback via toggleSelection (line 1046-1050)
✓ ProductDetailModal handleAddToCart checks for onAddToPicks callback and uses it instead of cart (line 834-847)
✓ MiniCart component shows selected items count and 'Send to My Concierge' button
✓ ConfirmationModal displays selected items before sending to concierge
✓ API /api/mira/top-picks/{pet_name} returns 110 picks across 11 pillars with proper structure
context_for_next_testing_agent: PersonalizedPicksPanel flow fully working. Key selectors: data-testid='personalized-picks-btn' to open panel, product cards are clickable to open ProductDetailModal, 'Include' button adds to picks. Note: Page can crash in Playwright due to heavy MiraDemoPage - use mobile viewport (390x844) to reduce memory usage.

verified_working.product_display: ✓ Shows 'Mira's Picks for Mojo' with product cards
verified_working.add_to_picks: ✓ 'Include' button adds item to picks list
verified_working.confirmation_modal: ✓ Shows items list with Cancel/Confirm buttons
verified_working.success_flow: ✓ Mira confirms 'Your 1 personalized picks for Mojo have been sent to your Concierge®!'

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/01_after_product_click.png - ProductDetailModal with 'Dog Birthday Cake Hamper W/ Toy'
.screenshots/02_after_add.png - Item added, checkmark visible, 'Send to My Concierge' button shown
.screenshots/04_after_confirm.png - Mira success message confirming picks sent
